eventScript.name: mounted
onChange_address_purpose
save
onClick_manage_address
eventScript.func:
(async () => {

    await this.openDialog('dialog_add_new_address');

    const address = arguments[0].row;

    this.setData({
        [`dialog_add_new_address.rowIndex`]: arguments[0].rowIndex,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.switch_save_as_default`]:  address.switch_save_as_default ? 1 : 0,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_purpose_id`]: address.address_purpose_id,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_name`]: address.address_name,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_country_id`]: address.address_country_id,

        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_line_1`]: address.address_line_1,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_line_2`]: address.address_line_2,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_line_3`]: address.address_line_3,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_line_4`]: address.address_line_4,

        [`dialog_add_new_address.adddress_state`]: address.adddress_state,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_city`]: address.address_city,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_postal_code`]: address.address_postal_code,

        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_phone`]: address.address_phone,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_phone2`]: address.address_phone2,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_mobile`]: address.address_mobile,

        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_email`]: address.address_email,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_fax_no`]: address.address_fax_no,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_fax_no2`]: address.address_fax_no2,
        [`dialog_add_new_address.address_attention`]: address.address_attention,
    })
})();
